message:
feat(workflows/handlers): tick 218 HandleAuthRequired::execute_step_cx override + lookup_cass_hints_with_cx helper (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Fifth per-impl Workflow migration. First of the "policy dispatch"
family (handlers that return StepResult::send_text(prompt) for
the runner to dispatch). The send itself isn't cx-threaded here
(the runner handles injection via the Workflow trait's
execute_step_cx routing from tick 187); only the step body's
storage/cass calls need cx routing.

Added two pieces:

1. **`lookup_cass_hints_with_cx`** on HandleAuthRequired. Simpler
   than the two other cass-using handlers — single-query cass
   lookup (no candidate loop), so no per-query checkpoint needed.
   `cass.search_with_cx` observes cx at entry.

2. **`execute_step_cx` override** (3 steps):
   - Step 0: `storage.get_audit_actions_with_cx` (cooldown read)
   - Step 1: Pure classification — no async ops, just pre-step checkpoint
   - Step 2: `lookup_cass_hints_with_cx` + `record_audit_action_with_cx`
   - Pre-step `cx.checkpoint()` gates entry between all 3 steps

Legacy `execute_step` and `lookup_cass_hints` preserved.

Tracing annotation: `explicit_cx = true` on info/warn/debug/error
spans.

Verification: 1168 / 1168 workflows:: tests pass under
--features asupersync-runtime via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang,
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Per-impl Workflow migration progress: 5/8+ handlers.rs impls:
- ✅ HandleSessionEnd (tick 214)
- ✅ HandleSessionStartContext (tick 215)
- ✅ HandleOnErrorCassSearch (tick 216)
- ✅ HandleSwarmLearningIndex (tick 217)
- ✅ HandleAuthRequired (this, tick 218)
- HandleClaudeCodeLimits (next — similar shape)
- HandleGeminiQuota (similar to HandleAuthRequired)
- HandleProcessTriageLifecycle (most complex)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
